2603.20028.title: Orchestrating Human-AI Software Delivery: A Retrospective Longitudinal Field Study of Three Software Modernization Programs
2603.20028.paper_summary: Evidence on AI in software engineering still leans heavily toward individual task completion, while evidence on team-level delivery remains scarce. We report a retrospective longitudinal field study of Chiron, an industrial platform that coordinates humans and AI agents across four delivery stages: analysis, planning, implementation, and validation. The study covers three real software modernization programs -- a COBOL banking migration (~30k LOC), a large accounting modernization (~400k LOC), and a .NET/Angular mortgage modernization (~30k LOC) -- observed across five delivery configurations: a traditional baseline and four successive platform versions (V1--V4). The benchmark separates observed outcomes (stage durations, task volumes, validation-stage issues, first-release coverage) from modeled outcomes (person-days and senior-equivalent effort under explicit staffing scenarios). Under baseline staffing assumptions, portfolio totals move from 36.0 to 9.3 summed project-weeks; modeled raw effort falls from 1080.0 to 232.5 person-days; modeled senior-equivalent effort falls from 1080.0 to 139.5 SEE-days; validation-stage issue load falls from 8.03 to 2.09 issues per 100 tasks; and first-release coverage rises from 77.0% to 90.5%. V3 and V4 add acceptance-criteria validation, repository-native review, and hybrid human-agent execution, simultaneously improving speed, coverage, and issue load. The evidence supports a central thesis: the largest gains appear when AI is embedded in an orchestrated workflow rather than deployed as an isolated coding assistant.
2603.20028.paper_summary_zh: 證據顯示，AI 在軟體工程中的應用仍然主要集中於個別任務的完成，而有關團隊層級交付的證據則相對稀少。<lb/>我們報告了一項回顧性縱向實地研究，研究對象是 Chiron，一個協調人類與 AI 代理的工業平台，涵蓋四個交付階段：分析、規劃、實施和驗證。<lb/>該研究涵蓋了三個實際的軟體現代化計劃——一個 COBOL 銀行遷移（約 30,000 行代碼）、一個大型會計現代化（約 400,000 行代碼）和一個 .NET/Angular 抵押貸款現代化（約 30,000 行代碼）——這些計劃在五種交付配置下進行觀察：一個傳統基準和四個連續的平台版本（V1--V4）。<lb/>基準將觀察到的結果（階段持續時間、任務量、驗證階段問題、首次發布覆蓋率）與建模結果（在明確人員配置情境下的人日和高級等效工作量）區分開來。<lb/>在基準人員配置假設下，投資組合總計從 36.0 下降到 9.3 總項目週；建模的原始工作量從 1080.0 降至 232.5 人日；建模的高級等效工作量從 1080.0 降至 139.5 SEE 天；驗證階段問題負載從每 100 個任務的 8.03 降至 2.09 問題；首次發布覆蓋率從 77.0% 上升至 90.5%。<lb/>V3 和 V4 增加了接受標準驗證、存儲庫原生審查和混合人機執行，同時提高了速度、覆蓋率和問題負載。<lb/>這些證據支持一個核心論點：當 AI 嵌入在協調的工作流程中時，最大的收益出現，而不是作為孤立的編碼助手進行部署。
2603.20028.author: Maximiliano Armesto et.al.
